purpose: Addendum round A3 — live proof of the delayed-resume re-sign guard: service stopped through the publication deadline until the persisted activation stamp went stale; on restart the guard re-signed the held VL with a fresh publication-anchored stamp and published exactly once

guard_assertion.service_log: Round 309: re-signed held VL for fresh activation (was 2026-07-02T18:53:09+00:00, now 2026-07-02T19:09:38.805322+00:00)
guard_assertion.verdict: PASS - stale stamp detected and re-signed at publication; IPFS bundle and GitHub Pages carry the identical re-signed document

sidecar_participation.explanation: in-flight participate passes completed their commits despite the API stop; the reveal window (18:45:42-18:50:42) fell entirely inside the deliberate outage, so metadata resolution failed and all three reveals were missed
sidecar_participation.note: re-exercises the missing_reveal classification and the low-participation path on the hardened protocol; canonical VL publication was unaffected
